summary: Tested Vastgoed Kiosk PIN login features - 2 new features verified: 1) PIN login on /vastgoed landing page with 4-digit PIN entry and numeric keypad, 2) Kiosk page PIN protection with sessionStorage clearing on logout. All 14 frontend tests and 8 backend tests passed (100% success rate).

issues: React console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - minor issue with keypad rendering, does not affect functionality

test_results.pin_login_link_visible: PASS - 'Inloggen met PIN code' link visible below login form
test_results.pin_entry_screen_shows: PASS - Clicking PIN link shows PIN entry with 4 input fields and numeric keypad
test_results.pin_keypad_buttons: PASS - All 11 keypad buttons (0-9 + DEL) present with data-testid
test_results.invalid_pin_error: PASS - Invalid PIN (9999) shows error 'Ongeldige PIN code. Probeer opnieuw.'
test_results.valid_pin_redirect: PASS - Valid PIN (1234) auto-submits and redirects to kiosk page
test_results.kiosk_welcome_after_pin_login: PASS - After PIN login, kiosk welcome page shows directly (no second PIN entry)
test_results.switch_to_password_link: PASS - 'Inloggen met wachtwoord' link visible on PIN screen
test_results.register_link_on_pin_screen: PASS - 'Registreer hier' link visible on PIN screen
test_results.beheerder_button_visible: PASS - Beheerder button visible on kiosk welcome page
test_results.uitloggen_button_visible: PASS - Uitloggen button visible on kiosk welcome page
test_results.logout_clears_session: PASS - Logout clears sessionStorage and redirects to /vastgoed
test_results.direct_kiosk_url_requires_pin: PASS - Direct visit to /vastgoed/{company_id} shows PIN entry for companies with PIN set
test_results.pin_required_after_logout: PASS - After logout, kiosk requires PIN again
test_results.password_login_works: PASS - Password login (email + password) still works correctly

backend_test_results.test_pin_login_valid_pin: PASS - POST /api/kiosk/auth/pin with PIN 1234 returns company_id, name, email, token
backend_test_results.test_pin_login_invalid_pin: PASS - Invalid PIN returns 401 with 'Ongeldige PIN code'
backend_test_results.test_company_with_pin_shows_has_pin_true: PASS - Company public endpoint shows has_pin: true
backend_test_results.test_verify_pin_valid: PASS - PIN verification endpoint returns valid: true with token

features_tested: Login page shows 'Inloggen met PIN code' link below the login form
Clicking 'Inloggen met PIN code' shows PIN entry screen with 4 input fields and numeric keypad
Entering valid PIN (1234) on login page auto-submits and redirects to kiosk page
After PIN login, kiosk welcome page shows directly (no second PIN entry required)
Entering invalid PIN shows error message 'Ongeldige PIN code'
PIN login page has 'Inloggen met wachtwoord' link to switch back
PIN login page has 'Registreer hier' link
Password login still works (email + password flow)
Logout clears sessionStorage (PIN verification) so kiosk requires PIN again
Direct visit to kiosk URL shows PIN entry for companies with PIN set
Beheerder and Uitloggen buttons visible on kiosk welcome page
critical_code_review_comments: CompanySelect.jsx correctly implements PIN login mode with KioskAuthForm (line 234-476)
PIN login sets sessionStorage to prevent double PIN entry on kiosk page (line 371)
KioskLayout.jsx correctly checks sessionStorage for PIN verification (line 43-48)
KioskWelcome.jsx logout correctly clears both localStorage and sessionStorage (line 13-18)
Backend POST /api/kiosk/auth/pin endpoint correctly validates PIN and returns token (line 199-213)
Minor: React key warning in keypad - consider using unique keys for keypad buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: PIN login feature fully working: 1) /vastgoed landing page has 'Inloggen met PIN code' link that shows PIN entry screen with 4 input fields and numeric keypad, 2) Valid PIN (1234) auto-submits and redirects to kiosk page with sessionStorage set, 3) Kiosk page checks sessionStorage and shows PIN entry if not verified, 4) Logout clears both localStorage and sessionStorage so PIN is required again. Password login also works. Tuya circuit breaker API is MOCKED in backend.

mocked_apis.note: Tuya circuit breaker API in kiosk.py is MOCKED
